scripts.link:neon-js: cd packages/auth && pnpm link && cd ../postgrest-js && pnpm link && cd ../auth-ui && pnpm link && cd ../neon-js && pnpm link
scripts.build: pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/internal' run build && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/postgrest-js' run build && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth-ui' run build && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth' run build && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/neon-js' run build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/postgrest-js' run dev & pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth' run dev & pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth-ui' run dev & pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/neon-js' run dev
scripts.test: pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/postgrest-js' run test && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth' run test && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth-ui' run test && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/neon-js' run test
scripts.test:node: pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/postgrest-js' run test:node && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth' run test:node && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth-ui' run test:node && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/neon-js' run test:node
scripts.test:ci: pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/postgrest-js' run test:ci && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth' run test:ci && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth-ui' run test:ci && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/neon-js' run test:ci
scripts.release: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/postgrest-js' run release && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth' run release && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/auth-ui' run release && pnpm --filter '@neondatabase/neon-js' run release
scripts.release:postgrest-js: echo 'Use the GitHub Actions Release workflow. See README.md' && exit 1
scripts.release:auth: echo 'Use the GitHub Actions Release workflow. See README.md' && exit 1
scripts.release:auth-ui: echo 'Use the GitHub Actions Release workflow. See README.md' && exit 1
scripts.release:neon-js: echo 'Use the GitHub Actions Release workflow. See README.md' && exit 1
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter e2e run test
scripts.test:e2e:ui: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter e2e run test:ui
scripts.test:e2e:debug: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter e2e run test:debug
scripts.test:e2e:ci: pnpm run build && cd examples/react-neon-js && pnpm run build && cd ../.. && pnpm --filter e2e run test:ci
